cleavage agent: first with LysC (1.6 μg per 100 μl bead volume, 4 h at 37 °C)
collision energy: HCD with a normalized collision energy of 30%
instrument: data-dependent acquisition mass spectrometry on a Thermo Orbitrap Fusion Lumos
ionization type: coupled online to a Thermo Fisher Scientific Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid Mass Spectrometer via a nano-electrospray ion source
labeling: the mass spectrometry data displayed in the main figures is from a representative replicate selected for optimal streptavidin pull-down efficiency and protein yield
